Project Description.template: This ReqView Example Project demonstrates how you can easily manage requirements in ReqView. It describes basic functionality of a requirements management tool and consists of the following documents: NEEDS (top level needs as user stories), ASVS (IS requirements using the OWASP ASVS standard), RISKS (risks analysis using the FMEA method), SRS (low-level SW requirements using the ISO 29148 standard), TESTS (test cases), and ARCH (SW packages).
